news_items.title: Bosnia and Herzegovina vs Qatar prediction: World Cup 2026 preview, team news, lineups & h2h
news_items.text:
# Bosnia and Herzegovina vs Qatar prediction: World Cup 2026 preview, team news, lineups & h2h

Published: 2026-06-21T19:46:35+03:00
Source: blog.ke.sportpesa.com (blog.ke.sportpesa.com)
Language: en

## Story

Bosnia and Herzegovina vs Qatar prediction: World Cup 2026 preview, team news, lineups & h2h

# Bosnia and Herzegovina vs Qatar prediction: World Cup 2026 preview, team news, lineups & h2h

https://blog.ke.sportpesa.com/author/belvineomondi/

#### Bybelvineomondi

- DOWNLOAD SP Score
- Here is the Bosnia and Herzegovina vs Qatar prediction article for World Cup 2026 which breaks down form, key players, best odds and H2H meetings ahead of the clash.
- The match will be staged at Seattle Stadium on Wednesday June 24.
- Kickoff is at 10:00pm EAT.

Bosnia and Herzegovina and Qatar meet in a decisive Group B clash at Seattle Stadium, with both nations fighting to keep their FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout hopes alive after disappointing results on Matchday 2.

The two sides head into the encounter level on one point apiece. Bosnia and Herzegovina suffered a heavy 4-1 defeat to Switzerland, while Qatar endured a humiliating 6-0 loss against co-hosts Canada.

With Canada and Switzerla

news_items.title: Qatar brace for Bosnia-Herzegovina test as World Cup survival hangs in balance | The Peninsula Qatar
news_items.text:
Qatar brace for Bosnia-Herzegovina test as World Cup survival hangs in balance | The Peninsula Qatar

CHAIRMAN: DR. KHALID BIN THANI AL THANI

EDITOR-IN-CHIEF: PROF. KHALID MUBARAK AL-SHAFI

### Sports / Football

https://thepeninsulaqatar.com/category/sports https://thepeninsulaqatar.com/category/Football

# Qatar brace for Bosnia-Herzegovina test as World Cup survival hangs in balance

Qatar players during a training session.

Copy

##### Fawad Hussain | The Peninsula

https://thepeninsulaqatar.com/reporter/fawad-hussain

Doha, Qatar: Qatar have stepped up preparations for their FIFA World Cup Group B clash against Bosnia and Herzegovina in Seattle tomorrow, with both sides heading into the fixture knowing that the margin for error has effectively disappeared at this stage of the competition.

The match comes after setbacks for both teams in their previous outings.

Qatar were beaten by Canada 0-6 in their last group game, while Bosnia and Herzegovina also went down against Switzerland 1-4. With Canada and Switzerland now in stronger positions in the group, the equation is straightforward for Qatar and Bosnia – anything short of a positive result could bring their campaigns to a
